description: A comment on a post, reblog, or another comment. Equivalent to a Tumblr 'note' — a lightweight text response that does not appear in the commenter's own feed.

main.description: A comment (note) on a Backyard post or reblog.

text.description: The text content of the comment.

subject.description: The direct parent record being commented on (a post, reblog, or another comment).

root.description: The root post of the thread. Always a blue.backyard.feed.post.

parent.description: If replying to another comment, the parent comment. If absent, subject is the direct parent.
